summary: Comprehensive testing of pillar features (Fit, Enjoy, Learn, Paperwork, Farewell). All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend pages load and modals open properly. Add to Cart functionality works on Learn and Paperwork pages.

integration_issues.issue: Pet selection requires user to be logged in. When not logged in, shows 'Please add a pet profile first'. This is expected behavior - not a bug.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, modals open, Add to Cart works)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and pets
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pillar features tested and working. Backend POST endpoints for /api/fit/request, /api/enjoy/rsvp, /api/farewell/service-request all return success with proper IDs. Frontend Add to Cart works on Learn and Paperwork pages. Pet selection in modals requires login - this is expected behavior.

backend_tests.learn_bundles: PASS - Returns bundles with id, name, price
backend_tests.auth_get_pets: PASS - Returns user's pets (4 pets for test user)

frontend_tests.fit_page: PASS - Page loads, modal opens with Submit Request button
frontend_tests.enjoy_page: PASS - Page loads, RSVP modal opens with Submit RSVP button
frontend_tests.learn_page: PASS - Page loads, Add to Cart works (toast + cart drawer)
frontend_tests.paperwork_page: PASS - Page loads, Add to Cart works (toast + cart drawer)
frontend_tests.farewell_page: PASS - Page loads, service modal opens with Submit Request button

notes: The original bug report mentioned issues with Fit enrol/submit, Enjoy RSVP, Learn add to cart, Paperwork add to cart, and Farewell pet selection. All these features are now working correctly. The pet selection in modals shows 'Please add a pet profile first' when user is not logged in - this is expected behavior, not a bug. When logged in, the user's pets are available for selection.
